pm.content:
Analyze this app idea and provide:
1. App name suggestion
2. List of 4-6 screens needed (e.g., Home, Settings, Profile)
3. For each screen, write a detailed Stitch design prompt (be specific about layout, colors, components)
4. Key features list

App idea: "A habit tracker app with dark theme and streak counter"

Respond in JSON format:
{
  "appName": "...",
  "screens": [
    {"name": "Home", "prompt": "Design a modern iOS home screen with..."},
    ...
  ],
  "features": ["feature1", "feature2", ...]
}

{"appName":"Notely","screens":[{"name":"Folders","description":"Main screen showing all folders and quick access notes","prompt":"Design a modern iOS main screen with dark theme (#0D0D0F background). Top section: large bold 'Folders' title in white, search bar below with dark gray (#1C1C1E) background and magnifying glass icon. Grid layout (2 columns) of folder cards: each card has dark gray background (#1C1C1E), 16px border radius, folder emoji icon (📁), folder name in white, note count in gray (#8E8E93). Default folders: All Notes, Favorites, Recently Deleted with distinct icons. User folders below with colored accent dots. Floating action button bottom right: purple (#7C3AED) circle with '+' icon for new folder. Bottom tab bar with dark background: Folders (active, purple), Search, Settings icons."},{"name":"Notes List","description":"List of notes inside a selected folder","prompt":"Design a modern iOS notes list screen with dark theme (#0D0D0F background). Top navigation: back arrow, folder name centered in white, sort button (three lines) and new note button (+) on right. Search bar below with dark gray background. Vertical list of note cards: each card dark gray (#1C1C1E) background, 12px radius, note title in white bold (first line of note), preview text in gray (#8E8E93) showing 2 lines of content, timestamp 'Today 2:30 PM' in small gray text bottom right, star icon for favorites. Swipe actions indicated: swipe left for delete (red), swipe right for favorite (yellow). Empty state: illustration with 'No notes yet' text and 'Create Note' button."},{"name":"Note Editor","description":"Markdown editor with live preview","prompt":"Design a modern iOS note editor screen with dark theme (#0D0D0F background). Top navigation: back arrow, note title editable field centered, more options button (three dots) on right. Toolbar below navigation: markdown formatting buttons in horizontal scroll - Bold (B), Italic (I), Heading (H), List (bullet icon), Checkbox, Link, Code, Image icons - all in gray, active state in purple. Main content area: full-width text editor with monospace font for markdown, syntax highlighting (headers in purple, bold in white, links in blue #60A5FA, code blocks in dark gray #2C2C2E with slight border). Floating button bottom right: toggle preview/edit mode icon. Keyboard toolbar with done button and quick formatting shortcuts."},{"name":"Preview Mode","description":"Rendered markdown preview of the note","prompt":"Design a modern iOS markdown preview screen with dark theme (#0D0D0F background). Top navigation: back arrow, 'Preview' label centered, edit pencil button and share button on right. Rendered markdown content: H1 headers large white bold, H2 slightly smaller, body text in light gray (#E5E5EA), bullet lists with purple dots, numbered lists with purple numbers, checkboxes with purple checkmarks, code blocks with dark gray (#1C1C1E) background and monospace font, links in blue (#60A5FA) underlined, blockquotes with purple left border and italic text, horizontal rules as thin gray lines. Smooth scrolling content area. Bottom: word count and reading time in small gray text."},{"name":"Search","description":"Global search across all notes with filters","prompt":"Design a modern iOS search screen with dark theme (#0D0D0F background). Top: large search bar with dark gray (#1C1C1E) background, magnifying glass icon, 'Search notes...' placeholder, clear X button when typing. Filter chips below: 'All', 'Favorites', 'This Week', 'Has Images', 'Has Checklists' - horizontal scroll, selected chip has purple background, unselected dark gray. Results list: note cards showing title in white, matching text highlighted in purple (#7C3AED), folder name tag in small gray pill, timestamp. Recent searches section when empty: clock icon with 'Recent' label, list of recent search terms. Empty results state: magnifying glass illustration with 'No results found' text."},{"name":"Settings","description":"App settings and preferences","prompt":"Design a modern iOS settings screen with dark theme (#0D0D0F background). Grouped table view style. Section 'Editor': font size slider, default font picker (System, Monospace, Serif), line spacing option, spell check toggle. Section 'Organization': default folder picker, sort order (Date Modified, Date Created, Alphabetical), show note preview toggle. Section 'Sync': iCloud sync toggle with status indicator, last synced timestamp. Section 'Appearance': app icon picker grid, accent color picker (purple, blue, green, orange circles). Section 'Data': export all notes button, import notes button. All rows have dark gray (#1C1C1E) backgrounds, SF Symbol icons in purple on left, labels in white, values/toggles on right. App version at bottom in gray."}],"features":["Create and organize notes in custom folders","Full markdown support with live preview","Syntax highlighting for headers, links, code blocks","Global search with filters and highlighting","Favorite notes for quick access","iCloud sync across devices","Customizable editor font and size","Export notes as markdown or PDF","Swipe gestures for quick actions","Dark theme optimized interface"]}

{"appName":"Breeze","screens":[{"name":"Home","description":"Main weather dashboard with current conditions and hourly forecast","prompt":"Design a modern iOS weather home screen with dark theme. Dynamic gradient background based on weather: deep blue (#0F172A) to purple (#1E1B4B) for night, light blue gradient for day. Top section: city name in white bold, 'Updated 5 min ago' in small gray. Large temperature display: 72° in extra bold white (96pt font), weather condition icon (sun, cloud, rain) 64px next to it, 'Partly Cloudy' label below. Feels like, humidity, wind speed in horizontal row of pill-shaped cards with glassmorphism effect. Hourly forecast section: horizontal scrollable cards showing next 24 hours, each card has hour (2 PM), weather icon (32px), temperature in white, precipitation percentage in blue if raining. Bottom section: 7-day forecast preview showing 3 days with day name, icon, high/low temps. Tab bar: Home (active), Map, Locations, Settings."},{"name":"Hourly Detail","description":"Detailed hourly breakdown with charts and conditions","prompt":"Design a modern iOS hourly forecast detail screen with dark theme (#0F172A background). Top navigation: back arrow, 'Hourly Forecast' title centered in white, calendar icon on right to jump to date. Temperature line chart: purple gradient line showing temperature curve over 24 hours, current time marked with vertical dashed line, temperature labels on Y axis, hour labels on X axis (12 AM, 6 AM, 12 PM, 6 PM). Below chart: scrollable list of hourly cards - each card full width, dark gray (#1E293B) background, 12px radius, shows hour, large weather icon, temperature, wind direction arrow, wind speed, humidity percentage, UV index, precipitation chance with rain drop icon. Pull to reveal additional details. Segment control at top: Temperature, Precipitation, Wind to switch chart data."},{"name":"Locations","description":"Manage multiple saved locations","prompt":"Design a modern iOS locations management screen with dark theme (#0F172A background). Top: 'Locations' title large white bold, '+' add button on right, 'Edit' text button. Search bar below: dark gray (#1E293B) background, search icon, 'Search city...' placeholder. Current location card at top: has location arrow icon, 'Current Location' label, city name, current temp and weather icon, gradient blue background to stand out. Saved locations list: vertical cards with dark gray background, city name in white bold, country in gray, current temperature large on right, small weather icon, high/low temps below. Each card shows subtle weather-appropriate gradient tint. Swipe left to delete with red background. Empty state: globe illustration, 'Add locations to track weather worldwide' text, 'Add Location' purple button."},{"name":"Weather Map","description":"Interactive weather radar and map overlay","prompt":"Design a modern iOS weather map screen with dark theme. Full screen map with dark style tiles. Top floating search bar: glassmorphism effect, rounded, search icon, current location name. Map overlay controls floating on right: stack of circular buttons with glassmorphism - layers icon (toggle radar, temperature, precipitation, wind), current location crosshair button, zoom +/- buttons. Bottom sheet (half screen, draggable): layer legend showing color scale for selected overlay (blue to red for temperature, green to red for precipitation intensity), timestamp showing radar data time, play button to animate radar over last 2 hours. Map shows radar overlay with rain/snow in green/blue/yellow/red colors. City markers on map: circular pins with current temperature. Top left: back arrow in circular button."},{"name":"Daily Detail","description":"Detailed forecast for a specific day","prompt":"Design a modern iOS daily detail screen with dark theme (#0F172A background). Top: back arrow, day name 'Wednesday, Mar 15' centered, share button. Hero section: large weather icon (80px), high temp in bold white (48pt), low temp in gray, condition 'Mostly Sunny' text. Sun schedule: sunrise and sunset times with icons on horizontal timeline showing daylight hours in yellow gradient arc. Detail cards in 2x2 grid: 'Feels Like' with thermometer icon, 'Humidity' with water drop, 'Wind' with wind icon showing direction, 'UV Index' with sun icon and level bar (Low/Moderate/High). Hourly breakdown for that day: horizontal scroll of hour cards with temp and icons. Additional info section: visibility distance, pressure with arrow indicating rising/falling, dew point, moon phase with icon."},{"name":"Settings","description":"App preferences and units configuration","prompt":"Design a modern iOS settings screen with dark theme (#0F172A background). Grouped sections with dark gray (#1E293B) card backgrounds. Section 'Units': temperature toggle (°C / °F pill selector), wind speed (km/h, mph, m/s), pressure (hPa, inHg, mmHg), distance (km, mi). Section 'Notifications': severe weather alerts toggle, daily forecast notification toggle with time picker, precipitation alerts toggle. Section 'Appearance': app icon selector showing 6 icon variants in grid, always dark theme indicator. Section 'Data': weather data source info, refresh interval picker (15 min, 30 min, 1 hour). Section 'About': rate app, share app, privacy policy, version number. All toggles use purple (#7C3AED) accent color when enabled. Section headers in gray uppercase small text."}],"features":["Real-time weather with minute-by-minute updates","24-hour detailed hourly forecast","7-day extended forecast with daily details","Interactive weather radar map with animation","Multiple location tracking and management","Severe weather alerts and notifications","Customizable units (temperature, wind, pressure)","Sunrise/sunset and moon phase information","UV index and air quality data","Beautiful weather-adaptive backgrounds"]}

{"appName":"Serene","tagline":"Find your calm, one breath at a time","screens":[{"name":"Home","description":"Daily meditation dashboard with personalized recommendations and quick-start sessions"},{"name":"Explore","description":"Browse meditation library by category, duration, and instructor"},{"name":"Session Player","description":"Active meditation screen with audio controls, timer, and ambient visuals"},{"name":"Progress","description":"Statistics dashboard showing streaks, total minutes, and meditation history"},{"name":"Profile","description":"User settings, preferences, and achievement badges"},{"name":"Sleep Stories","description":"Bedtime content library with soothing narrated stories"}],"suggestedFeatures":[{"id":"breathing_exercises","name":"Guided Breathing Patterns","description":"Interactive breathing exercises with visual guides (4-7-8, box breathing, calm breath) that sync animations with inhale/exhale cycles for anxiety relief and focus","priority":"high"},{"id":"session_customization","name":"Build Your Session","description":"Let users create custom meditation sessions by combining intro, breathing, guided content, ambient sounds, and closing bell to match their exact needs","priority":"high"},{"id":"mindful_minutes_goal","name":"Daily Mindful Minutes Goal","description":"Set personalized daily meditation goals with gentle reminders and celebrate when users hit their target, building consistent practice habits","priority":"high"},{"id":"mood_checkin","name":"Pre/Post Session Mood Check","description":"Quick emoji-based mood tracking before and after sessions to show users the measurable impact meditation has on their emotional state over time","priority":"medium"},{"id":"ambient_soundscapes","name":"Mixable Soundscapes","description":"Layer ambient sounds (rain, forest, ocean, fireplace) with adjustable individual volumes to create personalized background audio during sessions","priority":"medium"},{"id":"meditation_timer","name":"Unguided Timer with Intervals","description":"Simple timer for self-guided meditation with customizable interval bells, perfect for experienced meditators who don't need narration","priority":"medium"},{"id":"sleep_wind_down","name":"Sleep Wind-Down Routine","description":"Curated evening sequences combining gentle stretches, breathing, and sleep stories that gradually lower screen brightness as session progresses","priority":"low"},{"id":"focus_sessions","name":"Focus Mode Integration","description":"Timed focus sessions with ambient sounds designed for work/study, integrating with iOS Focus modes to minimize distractions","priority":"low"}],"techStack":["SwiftUI","AVFoundation for audio playback","SwiftData for local progress storage","HealthKit for mindful minutes sync","BackgroundTasks for reminder notifications","CloudKit for cross-device sync","Lottie for breathing animations","MediaPlayer for lock screen controls"]}

{"appName":"Stillness","tagline":"Breathe deep, live present","screens":[{"name":"Home","description":"Welcome screen with daily featured meditation and quick-start options"},{"name":"Library","description":"Browse all guided sessions by category, duration, and voice"},{"name":"Session Player","description":"Meditation playback with audio controls, timer, and calming visuals"},{"name":"Favorites","description":"Saved meditations for quick access to preferred sessions"},{"name":"Settings","description":"Audio preferences, notification schedule, and account options"}],"suggestedFeatures":[{"id":"voice_selection","name":"Choose Your Guide","description":"Multiple narrator voices with different styles (calm female, deep male, whisper mode) so users connect with a voice that resonates with them","priority":"high"},{"id":"session_duration_flex","name":"Flexible Duration Options","description":"Same meditation content available in 5, 10, 15, or 20 minute versions so users can fit practice into any schedule","priority":"high"},{"id":"offline_downloads","name":"Download for Offline","description":"Save guided sessions locally for meditation during flights, commutes, or areas without connectivity","priority":"high"},{"id":"breathing_intro","name":"Guided Breathing Warm-Up","description":"Optional 1-minute breathing exercise before each session to help users transition from busy mind to meditation-ready state","priority":"medium"},{"id":"ambient_mixer","name":"Background Sound Layers","description":"Add customizable ambient sounds (rain, waves, forest) underneath the guided voice at adjustable volumes","priority":"medium"},{"id":"gentle_ending","name":"Gradual Wake Bell","description":"Soft chime sequence that slowly brings users back rather than abrupt ending, with optional extended silence after session","priority":"medium"},{"id":"beginner_course","name":"7-Day Starter Journey","description":"Structured introductory program teaching meditation basics progressively, perfect for complete beginners","priority":"low"},{"id":"bedtime_mode","name":"Sleep Session Mode","description":"Screen dims automatically, audio fades out gradually, and phone stays silent after session ends for uninterrupted sleep","priority":"low"}],"techStack":["SwiftUI","AVFoundation for audio streaming and playback","SwiftData for favorites and download management","FileManager for offline audio storage","BackgroundAudio for lock screen playback","MediaPlayer for control center integration","UserNotifications for meditation reminders"]}

Analyze this iOS app and return ONLY JSON:
App: "A Alarm app with if user does not wake up has to pay 1 dolar. Create make sense app idea from this and implement."

{
  "appName": "AppName",
  "tagline": "Short tagline",
  "screens": [{"name": "ScreenName", "description": "Purpose"}],
  "suggestedFeatures": [{"id": "unique_id", "name": "Feature", "description": "Why useful", "priority": "high|medium|low"}],
  "techStack": ["SwiftUI", "etc"]
}

Suggest 4-8 app-specific features.

{"appName":"WakeStake","tagline":"Put your money where your snooze is","screens":[{"name":"Home","description":"Active alarms list with stake amounts and wake-up success rate"},{"name":"Set Alarm","description":"Create alarm with time, stake amount, and challenge type selection"},{"name":"Wake Challenge","description":"Full-screen challenge that must be completed to prove you're awake and save your money"},{"name":"Wallet","description":"Balance overview, earnings from successful wakes, and payment history"},{"name":"Stats","description":"Wake-up success rate, money saved/lost, streak tracking"},{"name":"Settings","description":"Payment methods, challenge difficulty, and alarm preferences"}],"suggestedFeatures":[{"id":"progressive_stakes","name":"Escalating Stakes","description":"Stake increases each time you hit snooze - $1 first snooze, $2 second, $5 third - creating real urgency to get up immediately","priority":"high"},{"id":"wake_challenges","name":"Proof-of-Wake Challenges","description":"Math problems, photo verification (take selfie in bathroom), QR code scan, or shake phone 50 times to prove you're actually awake before disabling alarm","priority":"high"},{"id":"charity_donation","name":"Failed Stakes Go to Charity","description":"Lost money goes to user-selected charity instead of app, making failure feel purposeful and removing guilt about 'wasting' money","priority":"high"},{"id":"accountability_partner","name":"Wake Buddy System","description":"Connect with friend who gets notified if you fail - social accountability combined with financial stakes doubles motivation","priority":"medium"},{"id":"streak_rewards","name":"Streak Cashback","description":"Successfully wake up 7 days straight and earn back a percentage of stakes as bonus, rewarding consistency","priority":"medium"},{"id":"smart_difficulty","name":"Adaptive Challenge Difficulty","description":"App learns your snooze patterns and automatically increases challenge difficulty on days you typically oversleep","priority":"medium"},{"id":"location_dismiss","name":"Location-Based Disable","description":"Alarm only stops when you reach specific location like kitchen or bathroom, verified by GPS or room beacon","priority":"low"},{"id":"sleepover_mode","name":"Vacation Mode","description":"Pause stakes temporarily for weekends or holidays without breaking streak, because rest days matter too","priority":"low"}],"techStack":["SwiftUI","StoreKit 2 for in-app wallet and payments","UserNotifications with critical alerts for alarm","AVFoundation for alarm sounds","LocalAuthentication for secure wallet access","CoreLocation for location-based dismiss","CloudKit for accountability partner sync","Vision framework for selfie verification"]}

  "tagline": "Short tagline",

Suggest 4-8 app-specific features.

{"appName":"CalmCubs","tagline":"Peaceful minds for little ones","screens":[{"name":"Treehouse Home","description":"Playful hub with animated animal guide and daily meditation adventure"},{"name":"Adventure Map","description":"Visual journey map showing meditation sessions as explorable locations"},{"name":"Meditation Player","description":"Kid-friendly session screen with animated characters and simple controls"},{"name":"Breathing Games","description":"Interactive breathing exercises disguised as fun games"},{"name":"Reward Garden","description":"Virtual garden that grows with completed meditations"},{"name":"Parent Dashboard","description":"Progress reports, session history, and parental controls"}],"suggestedFeatures":[{"id":"animal_guides","name":"Friendly Animal Companions","description":"Cute animated characters (sleepy bear, calm owl, gentle bunny) guide children through meditations with age-appropriate voices and stories they can relate to","priority":"high"},{"id":"breathing_games","name":"Breathing Mini-Games","description":"Blow up a balloon, help a boat sail, or make flowers bloom by breathing in sync - turns breathing exercises into engaging play rather than boring instructions","priority":"high"},{"id":"story_meditations","name":"Imagination Journeys","description":"Guided visualizations as magical adventures - flying through clouds, exploring underwater kingdoms - keeping kids engaged while teaching mindfulness","priority":"high"},{"id":"reward_garden","name":"Growing Meditation Garden","description":"Each completed session plants a seed that grows into flowers, trees, or friendly creatures - visual progress that motivates continued practice","priority":"medium"},{"id":"bedtime_mode","name":"Sleepy Time Stories","description":"Calming bedtime meditations with gradually dimming screen, slower pace, and gentle music designed to help kids fall asleep naturally","priority":"medium"},{"id":"emotion_check","name":"Feelings Thermometer","description":"Simple visual mood selector before and after sessions helps kids identify emotions and see how meditation helps them feel better","priority":"medium"},{"id":"parent_insights","name":"Parent Progress Reports","description":"Weekly summaries showing meditation minutes, favorite activities, and emotional patterns so parents can support their child's mindfulness journey","priority":"low"},{"id":"sibling_mode","name":"Meditate Together Mode","description":"Sessions designed for multiple kids or parent-child pairs with turn-taking activities that make meditation a shared family experience","priority":"low"}],"techStack":["SwiftUI","AVFoundation for audio playback","SpriteKit for character animations","SwiftData for progress and garden state","Lottie for breathing game animations","FamilyControls for parental features","ScreenTime API for usage limits","CloudKit for family sharing sync"]}

Analyze this iOS app and return ONLY JSON:
App: "a text based game related space and survival"

{
  "appName": "AppName",
  "tagline": "Short tagline",
  "screens": [{"name": "ScreenName", "description": "Purpose"}],
  "suggestedFeatures": [{"id": "unique_id", "name": "Feature", "description": "Why useful", "priority": "high|medium|low"}],
  "techStack": ["SwiftUI", "etc"]
}

Suggest 4-8 app-specific features.

{"appName":"Void Survivor","tagline":"Your choices echo through the stars","screens":[{"name":"Ship Bridge","description":"Main command center showing ship status, crew, and current situation narrative"},{"name":"Story Screen","description":"Immersive text narrative with choice buttons and atmospheric visuals"},{"name":"Ship Systems","description":"Manage oxygen, fuel, food, hull integrity, and power levels"},{"name":"Crew Roster","description":"View crew members, their skills, health, and morale status"},{"name":"Star Map","description":"Navigate between planets, stations, and points of interest"},{"name":"Captain's Log","description":"Journal of past decisions, discoveries, and story progress"}],"suggestedFeatures":[{"id":"branching_narrative","name":"Consequential Choices","description":"Every decision ripples forward - save fuel now and starve later, rescue a stranger who might betray you, creating deeply personal story paths with no perfect playthrough","priority":"high"},{"id":"resource_tension","name":"Survival Resource Management","description":"Constantly balance oxygen, food, fuel, and power - tough choices like venting a compartment to save oxygen or rationing food force impossible decisions that define your story","priority":"high"},{"id":"crew_dynamics","name":"Crew Relationships & Skills","description":"Each crew member has personality, skills, and opinions - engineer fixes systems faster, medic keeps crew alive, but conflicts arise and trust must be earned through choices","priority":"high"},{"id":"random_events","name":"Procedural Space Encounters","description":"Distress signals, asteroid fields, alien contacts, and derelict ships appear randomly, ensuring each playthrough feels fresh and unpredictable","priority":"medium"},{"id":"permadeath_mode","name":"Iron Captain Mode","description":"Optional permadeath where poor choices end your journey permanently - heightens tension and makes every decision genuinely matter","priority":"medium"},{"id":"typing_immersion","name":"Typewriter Text Effect","description":"Story text appears letter by letter with ambient ship sounds, creating cinematic tension during critical moments and dangerous encounters","priority":"medium"},{"id":"multiple_endings","name":"Divergent Endings","description":"Reach Earth, colonize a new world, become space pirates, or drift forever - dramatically different conclusions based on accumulated choices and relationships","priority":"low"},{"id":"captains_log","name":"Shareable Story Export","description":"Export your unique journey as a readable story to share with friends, showing your path through the void and the choices that defined it","priority":"low"}],"techStack":["SwiftUI","SwiftData for game state and save system","Ink narrative scripting engine or custom parser","AVFoundation for ambient audio and sound effects","GameKit for achievements","CloudKit for save sync across devices","AttributedString for styled narrative text","Combine for reactive resource updates"]}

ios-dev.content:
Write a SwiftUI view struct for "Folders" screen.
App: A simple notes app with folders and markdown support
Description: Main screen showing all folders and quick access notes
Design: Design a modern iOS main screen with dark theme (#0D0D0F background). Top section: large bold 'Folders' title in white, search bar below with dark gray (#1C1C1E) background and magnifying glass icon. Grid layout (2 columns) of folder cards: each card has dark gray background (#1C1C1E), 16px border radius, folder emoji icon (📁), folder name in white, note count in gray (#8E8E93). Default folders: All Notes, Favorites, Recently Deleted with distinct icons. User folders below with colored accent dots. Floating action button bottom right: purple (#7C3AED) circle with '+' icon for new folder. Bottom tab bar with dark background: Folders (active, purple), Search, Settings icons.

Return ONLY the Swift code, no explanations. Use dark theme, modern iOS design.
Include: proper state management, SF Symbols, clean layout.

Write a SwiftUI view for "Crew Roster" screen.

Quick review for Void Survivor:
- Screens: Ship Bridge, Story Screen, Ship Systems, Crew Roster, Star Map, Captain's Log
- Features: Supabase, RevenueCat, Push Notifications, Analytics, iOS Widgets, Apple Watch, Dark Mode, Consequential Choices, Survival Resource Management, Crew Relationships & Skills, Procedural Space Encounters, Typewriter Text Effect, Divergent Endings, Shareable Story Export

List 3 critical test cases (one line each).

## 🧪 Void Survivor - Critical Test Cases

| # | Test Case |
|---|-----------|
| **1** | `test_consequentialChoice_whenSelected_shouldPersistAndAffectFutureStory()` — Choice state must survive app kill, sync via Supabase, and correctly branch narrative. |
| **2** | `test_resourceManagement_whenOxygenReachesZero_shouldTriggerGameOverNotCorruptSave()` — Resource depletion must end run gracefully without corrupting captain's log or losing IAP unlocks. |
| **3** | `test_revenueCat_whenPremiumPurchased_shouldUnlockAllEndingsAcrossDevices()` — IAP must sync to Supabase user profile and restore on Watch + iPhone + reinstall. |

---

**Honorable mentions:** Typewriter effect cancellation (skip button), Watch ↔ iPhone handoff mid-story, procedural encounter seed reproducibility for bug reports. 🚀
